tagline: The Marketplace provider console now features a step by step listing creation wizard that guides you through setting up general information, data assets, attributes, and details on separate pages.
what_it_does: The Marketplace provider console now features a step by step listing creation wizard that guides you through setting up general information, data assets, attributes, and details on separate pages. This page describes how to create shares and Databricks Marketplace listings for your data products. Prerequisites You or your Databricks administrator has completed the Databricks Marketplace provider setup process: Sign up to become a Databricks Marketplace provider, public or private Create a Marketplace provider profile Have the Marketplace admin role assigned to you For more information, see Become a Databricks Marketplace provider.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
